enc2.click.label: encoder 2 click → edit layer (auto-exits 1.5s after last twist)

edit.label: edit layer: ccw deletes a char per detent, cw walks cursor right

key_audio.label: audio → kill to line start (nuke the draft)

key_bar.label: bar → yank back what was killed (undo delete)

key_minus.command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events"' -e 'keystroke "/effort"' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'key code 36' -e 'delay 0.5' -e 'key code 123' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'key code 36' -e 'end tell'
key_minus.label: minus → /effort, Left, Enter (lower effort, paced)

key_pen.command:
orig=$(herdr pane current | jq -r '.result.pane.pane_id // empty'); [ -n "$orig" ] || exit 0; np=$(herdr pane split "$orig" --direction down --ratio 0.2 --focus | jq -r '.result.pane.pane_id // empty'); [ -n "$np" ] && herdr pane run "$np" "clear; printf ' New agent:
 1) claude
 2) codex
> '; read c; case \$c in 1) a=claude;; 2) a=codex;; *) a=;; esac; herdr agent focus $orig; [ -n "\$a" ] && herdr agent start "\$a-\$(date +%H%M%S)" --split right --focus -- \$a; exit"
key_pen.label: pen → CLI agent picker in temp bottom pane (1=claude 2=codex, play alone cancels)

key_plus.command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events"' -e 'keystroke "/effort"' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'key code 36' -e 'delay 0.5' -e 'key code 124' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'key code 36' -e 'end tell'
key_plus.label: plus → /effort, Right, Enter (raise effort, paced)

key_seq.label: seq → delete word (readline kill; push per word)

mod10.command: ws=$(herdr workspace list | jq -r '.result.workspaces[]|select(.focused).workspace_id'); id=$(herdr tab list --workspace "$ws" | jq -r '.result.tabs[1].tab_id // empty'); [ -n "$id" ] && herdr tab focus "$id"
mod10.label: track 2 → herdr tab 2

mod11.command: ws=$(herdr workspace list | jq -r '.result.workspaces[]|select(.focused).workspace_id'); id=$(herdr tab list --workspace "$ws" | jq -r '.result.tabs[2].tab_id // empty'); [ -n "$id" ] && herdr tab focus "$id"

mod5.label: space 1 → herdr workspace 1 (nop if absent)

mod9.label: track 1 → herdr tab 1 (focused workspace, nop if absent)

step1.command: t=$(herdr agent list | jq -r '.result.agents[0].terminal_id // empty'); [ -n "$t" ] && herdr agent focus "$t"
step1.label: step 1 → agent 1 (sidebar order, nop if absent)

transport.record.label: record → ptt (hold style — pairs with /voice hold)
